svg.title: Types of search in RAG
svg.desc: Five RAG search types shown as stacked rows: vector, keyword, hybrid, graph, and multi-query, each with a name, tag, and short description.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain vector semantic search in RAG in depth')
g.text: Converts text to embeddings, finds closest vectors by cosine similarity

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain keyword BM25 search in RAG in depth')
g.text: Matches exact words, scores by term frequency and rarity across docs

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain hybrid RAG search with RRF fusion in depth')
g.text: Merges both result lists using RRF or weighted scoring — best overall recall

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain Graph RAG and knowledge graph traversal in depth')
g.text: Stores entities as graph nodes, traverses relationships for multi-hop answers

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain multi-query retrieval in RAG in depth')
g.text: LLM rewrites query in multiple ways, retrieves for each, then deduplicates

svg.text: Click any row to learn more
